results.title: Creatify Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Based on 28 reviews

Review Creatify?

Reviewers are split on Creatify. Supporters say it is easy to learn, fast at turning a product link or prompt into usable ad videos, and strong on avatars, templates, visual quality, and support; some also like using it for product scenes and campaign variations. The main product complaints are limited fine-grained editing, uneven voice realism, lip-sync, output consistency, and weak non-English voiceovers. The sharpest criticism is about billing and refunds: many unhappy users describe confusing renewals, denied refunds, and poor support, which often outweighs their mixed views on video quality.

•1 review

This is an inferior product sold and managed by a VERY unethical company. They entice you to pay the annual fee at a very attractive discount (which I did) as opposed to the monthly option. So after really banging on it the general census was it basically sucked so I canceled but guess what? "Oh sorry sir, you cannot be refunded the unused 11 months and 25 days - we're going to go ahead and keep that. Tough luck." I even reached out to a support manager and they said "if you look deep within the T/C's you'll see it says the annual fee is not refundable. Whoever is running Creatify, you're running the company like a boiler room. Class it up a bit.

#### What needs improvement

no refund policy (6)deceptive billing practices (7)

results.title: Creatify: The AI Video Ad Maker | Product Hunt
results.content:
What impressed me most about AI Media Buyer is that it goes far beyond dashboards. It helps turn data into actionable decisions. From performance analysis and strategy recommendations to creative generation and optimization, it feels like a true AI co-worker rather than just another AI tool.

I’ve been fortunate to see this product evolve from the early days, helping refine the ads strategies behind it. Today, the quality of its recommendations is genuinely impressive, and it’s already become part of our internal workflow.

I truly believe AI Media Buyer is changing how paid advertising gets done. The future isn’t AI replacing marketers—it’s AI and marketers making better decisions together.

Huge congratulations to the Creatify team on the launch! 🚀

Report

12NextLast

•1 review [...] Maker

Hey Product Hunt, I'm Yinan, founder of Creatify.

Quick backstory: we've spent 3 years building Creatify. Started with URL to video, then avatars, Ad Clone, and a full creative agent. 3M+ users have used the platform.

But one thing kept bothering me. Our users would make great ads, launch them, then go back to staring at dashboards for hours trying to figure out what was working. The creative side was solved. The media buying side was still manual, scattered, and slow.

So we built AI Media Buyer an agent that plugs into your ad accounts and actually does the work.

How it runs: [...] 3.8

Based on 31 reviews

Review Creatify?

Reviewers split sharply on Creatify. Supporters say it makes ad videos fast and easy to produce, with an intuitive workflow, auto-generated scripts, captions, voiceover, and a wide avatar selection; small teams especially praise the time savings and helpful support. Repeated requests include clearer credit-use warnings, more editing control, better voice realism and lip-sync, and stronger consistency across ad variations. The strongest criticism is not features but billing: several users describe auto-renewal, no-refund disputes, and poor value when output quality or platform acceptance fell short.

results.content:

AI Media Buyer is now live in Creatify.
Running paid media has always meant living in dashboards. Pulling reports, spotting what's working three days too late, and rebuilding winners by hand.
Here's what our AI Media Buyer does:
• Connects to your ad accounts. Meta, Google, TikTok, and the platforms you already run, in one place.
• Finds your winners and losers. Surfaces what's scaling and the spend that’s being wasted, across every account.
• Acts, autonomously. The agent not only flags the move. It actions it for you as well.
• Builds on what works. Generates new creative from what's already converting in your account and your niche.
Most tools tell you what happened. AI Media Buyer does something about it.
Try it now in Creatify →

results.title: Creatify is rated "Great" with 4.1 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
I really appreciate how Creatify AI simplifies the ad creation process for me, allowing me to generate ads quickly. The ease of setup impressed me significantly, as getting started with the platform was very easy and straightforward. Creatify AI enables me to create realistic-looking avatars that can articulate my product offers effectively, which is a fantastic alternative to hiring UGC creators. I find particular value in the tool's auto captioning feature and its animations using the Aurora model, which enhances the ads beautifully. The Avatar library is also quite useful, providing a range of options to represent my brand. The integration with NanoBanana has been seamless, adding more value to my workflow. results.title: Introducing AI Media Buyer: AI That Runs Your Ads
results.content:
The early results point the same way. One agency cut its cost per acquisition 45% and improved ROAS 73% after moving creative and optimization into Creatify, and another reported 3x ROI. Creatify is rated 4.8 out of 5 across more than 1,000 reviews on G2.

## How it's different

Two distinctions matter. Against analytics tools and dashboards, the difference is action: those products report what happened, while AI Media Buyer makes the change for you. Against point AI ad tools that only generate creative or only optimize bids, the difference is the full loop: it connects creative, launch, and analysis in one place, so a new ad idea becomes a live, measured campaign without handing off between five tools. [...] The early results point the same way. One agency cut its cost per acquisition 45% and improved ROAS 73% after moving creative and optimization into Creatify, and another reported 3x ROI. Creatify is rated 4.8 out of 5 across more than 1,000 reviews on G2.

## How it's different

Two distinctions matter. Against analytics tools and dashboards, the difference is action: those products report what happened, while AI Media Buyer makes the change for you. Against point AI ad tools that only generate creative or only optimize bids, the difference is the full loop: it connects creative, launch, and analysis in one place, so a new ad idea becomes a live, measured campaign without handing off between five tools. [...] Today we're launching AI Media Buyer, an AI advertising agent inside Creatify that connects to your ad accounts and runs them. It audits your spend, finds what's scaling and what's leaking, builds new campaigns and creative, and launches them. Most tools tell you what happened. AI Media Buyer does something about it.

It's powered by Claude Opus 4.8, one of Anthropic's most advanced reasoning models, and it can go from a brief to a live campaign in under 60 seconds.

## What is an AI Media Buyer
